description: Natural language search over a video asset library, with shareable deep-linked clips. Editors describe what they need; the system finds and delivers the right footage.

customize.description: Identifier used in app create and build commands
URL mount point for the app (e.g. /asset-search)
Root path for the DB, scripts, clips, and source videos
Display name shown in the app header
Optional structured tag values for the product_in_frame field. Leave empty to let Gemini describe objects as free text.

post-install.name: Copy app source files
post-install.description:
Substitute all {{TOKEN}} placeholders in the app/ source files, then copy to the generated app directory:
  app/server/src/*.ts  →  /agent/apps/{{APP_NAME}}/server/src/
  app/frontend/index.html  →  /agent/apps/{{APP_NAME}}/frontend/index.html
  app/frontend/src/*.ts    →  /agent/apps/{{APP_NAME}}/frontend/src/
Do NOT copy buildeth-tools.ts or runtime.ts — those are generated by app create.

post-install.name: Download ONNX model (~133 MB, one-time)
post-install.description: python3 -c "import urllib.request, pathlib; pathlib.Path('{{BRAIN_PATH}}/models/bge-small-en-v1.5/onnx').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); [urllib.request.urlretrieve(f'https://huggingface.co/Xenova/bge-small-en-v1.5/resolve/main/{p}', f'{{BRAIN_PATH}}/models/bge-small-en-v1.5/{p}') for p in ['onnx/model.onnx','tokenizer.json','tokenizer_config.json']]; print('Model ready')"

post-install.name: Health check
post-install.description: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'{{BRAIN_PATH}}/scripts'); from asset_db import get_stats; print('DB ready:', get_stats())"

post-install.name: Introduce the new capability
post-install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.

changelog.notes: Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.
Cut clips at ingest in run_pipeline.py so the browser download button works without a separate clipping pass.
Drop Tailwind CDN runtime dependency in favor of inline CSS; make token substitution explicit in install step.
Initial release. Hybrid BM25+cosine search, ONNX-unified embeddings, browser app, agent-path search via query_shots.py.
